subcodes.first_line: On this day We awoke, and there were present before Our face the images of Our loved ones in 'Ishqábád. Unto each one We have revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اصبحنا الیوم و کان حاضرا امام الوجه صور اولیائی فی عشق آباد انزلنا لکل واحد
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @proclamation to Muslims, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
